mapper.select: select d.* from document d where d.knowledge_code = #{knowledgeCode}
select * from document where name = #{name} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into document (id, name, origin_uri, description, status, type, category, knowledge_code, object_store_path_origin, object_store_path_parsed, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{originUri}, #{description}, #{status}, #{type}, #{category}, #{knowledgeCode}, #{objectStorePathOrigin}, #{objectStorePathParsed}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
